tweets.text:
Here is something fascinating.

Gas Warich transited the Strait of Hormuz using the Oman lane. It is a sanctioned tanker. This will be the first time since the MOU that a sanctioned tanker used the Oman route. 

The inbound flow dropped off a cliff after July 3. Windward AI satellite showed no tanker dark transit on July 4.

We saw one big group escorted out, but nothing back in.

Very interesting.
